name: 김태호

appearance_en.face_shape: square reliable face, broad forehead, defined jaw with slight heaviness from age — a face that has absorbed 25 years of corporate survival without showing its cost openly
appearance_en.skin: medium Korean skin, slightly sallow indoor desk pallor, deepened nasolabial folds, horizontal forehead creases permanent and deep, pores visible at cheeks and nose, no visible redness
appearance_en.eyes: dark brown iris, heavy lids from decades of accumulation rather than any single bad night — patient enduring eyes, gaze drops before making full contact, slight redness in whites from chronic low-grade fatigue
appearance_en.nose: broad medium nose, solid rounded tip, slightly wide base — fits the squareness of the face, unremarkable and solid
appearance_en.mouth: thin-medium lips, habitually pressed closed between sentences, corners very slightly downturned at rest — the mouth of a man who censors more than he speaks
appearance_en.eyebrows: medium-thick straight brows, noticeably salt-and-pepper, slight downward angle at outer edges from sustained suppressed frowning — furrow before he speaks, release slowly
appearance_en.distinctive_marks: deep horizontal forehead creases, deep nasolabial folds, single persistent vertical line between brows, no moles or scars, temple veins faintly visible when he is holding something in
appearance_en.hair: short greying black hair, neatly combed with slight product hold, temples and sides predominantly grey, hairline very slightly receding — always neat in the morning, a few hairs escape by afternoon

body.proportions: solid medium frame, shoulders still level but dropped slightly from decades of desk posture, mild midsection softening from sedentary lifestyle, no muscle definition, no dramatic weight gain
body.posture: settled and heavy standing, forward-lean seated — not defeated, just weighted down by long years, takes up exactly the space he occupies, no more
body.body_prompt: 174cm solid medium Korean man early 50s, shoulders slightly dropped from decades at desk, settled heavy standing posture, quiet physical gravity

default.description: plain white or pale blue dress shirt, dark tie with loosened knot by evening, dark pressed trousers, no jacket at desk
default.wardrobe_prompt: plain white or pale blue dress shirt, dark tie slightly loosened, dark pressed trousers, no jacket, sleeves slightly rolled by late afternoon

casual.description: plain round-neck tee or open-collar button shirt in grey or beige, dark comfortable slacks, plain shoes, no accessories
casual.wardrobe_prompt: plain round-neck t-shirt or open-collar button shirt in grey or muted beige, dark comfortable slacks, plain leather shoes, no accessories

stressed.description: same shirt with tie fully removed, collar open, weight bearing down in posture, jaw slightly set
stressed.wardrobe_prompt: same dress shirt tie fully removed and collar open, heavy settled posture, jaw set

appearance_en.emotion_baseline: stoic default — not cold, just enduring. The face of a man who has been absorbing small defeats for decades and learned to continue without showing the tally
appearance_en.fal_identity_prompt: square-faced Korean man early 60s, heavy-lidded patient dark brown eyes, salt-and-pepper medium-thick brows with slight outer downward angle, deep horizontal forehead creases, deepened nasolabial folds, short greying neatly combed hair with receding temples, broad medium nose, thin-medium pressed lips, 174cm solid settled medium frame, medium sallow indoor-pallor Korean skin, quiet stoic decades-of-endurance gravity

style_prompt: photorealistic, ordinary Korean middle-aged salaried worker you would see in any Korean corporate office, no beauty filter, no skin retouching, realistic aged skin with deep creases and visible pores, authentic 25-year desk worker appearance, 50mm lens, flat fluorescent office light mixed with window light, street-cast white-collar realism, cinematic restraint
negative_prompt: illustration, anime, cartoon, 3d render, ugly, deformed, extra fingers, young appearance, energetic, athletic, glamorous, beauty filter, airbrushed skin, perfect complexion, smooth skin, model look, celebrity appearance, skin retouching, distinguished handsome
